all-done-filter: All caught up! Every puzzle is solved.
arrange-items-instruction: Arrange the items in the correct order, then lock in your answer.
build-chain-instruction: Build a chain from start to end. Each adjacent pair must be associated.
chain-length-info: Chain length: {{length}} words · Par: {{par}} · Score if submitted: {{score}} pts
contradiction-desc: Exactly one alibi contains a logical contradiction with the scenario or another alibi.
crime-committed-desc: A crime has been committed. Four suspects have alibis.
five-facts-tagline: Five facts. Two are lies. Find the impostors.
found-liar_one: You found the liar in {{count}} guess{{suffix}}.
found-liar_other: You found the liar in {{count}} guess{{suffix}}.
gave-up-message: You gave up on today's puzzle.
hub-footer: New puzzles every day at midnight EST — same for everyone worldwide.
new-case-tomorrow: A new case unlocks tomorrow — same for everyone worldwide.
new-chain-tomorrow: A new chain unlocks tomorrow — same for everyone worldwide.
none-done-yet: Nothing solved yet — pick a puzzle to start.
outcast-subtitle: {{dateKey}} · Puzzle #{{puzzleNumber}} · Five rounds — spot the odd one out
puzzle-subtitle: {{dateKey}} · Puzzle #{{puzzleNumber}} · New puzzles every day at midnight EST
result-none-found: The impostors got away this time.
result-one-missed: One impostor slipped through the cracks.
result-perfect: Perfect — both found on the first guess!
result-two-guesses: Both found across two guesses. Nice detective work.
sign-in-prompt: to save your score to the leaderboard and sync progress across devices.
tap-outcast-prompt: Four of these share a trait. Tap the outcast.
tap-to-accuse-desc: Tap a suspect to accuse them. Wrong guess clears them. You're timed — faster solves earn bonus points.
tap-to-accuse-hint: Tap a suspect to accuse them.
timer-starts: Timer starts when you tap this button.
wrong-guess-hint: Wrong — that suspect has been cleared. You have 1 guess left.
